prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 6.75L L410 V8 (engine code: L410) with a fully forged internals build featuring Mahle Motorsport 9.5:1 compression pistons, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Bryant Racing. Pair with a custom camshaft profile by Schrick (280° intake/288° exhaust duration, 0.550" lift) for optimized high-RPM power delivery.

Forced Induction: Install a custom twin-turbo system using Garrett GTX5533R turbos (86mm compressor wheels) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates and a custom air-to-water intercooler setup by PWR. Boost targets set to 18 psi with a Motec M150 ECU managing fueling via 1,200cc ID1700x injectors and a Radium Engineering dual fuel pump surge tank.

Drivetrain: Swap the stock GM-sourced TH400 transmission for a reinforced 4L80E from Sonnax with a billet torque converter (4,000 stall) and a Gear Vendors overdrive unit. Upgrade the rear differential to a custom 3.73:1 ratio Salisbury-type unit with a Quaife ATB differential and chromoly axles from Strange Engineering.
estetica: Body: Replace the stock steel panels with a full carbon fiber widebody kit by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS Corniche-specific design), featuring extended fenders, a custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a rear diffuser with active aero elements controlled by a Bosch ECU.

Wheels: Fit 22x10.5" front and 22x12.5" rear custom forged wheels by HRE (FF16 model) with a concave design, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (285/30 front, 325/25 rear). Use a custom hub-centric adapter system by D2 Racing to retain OEM wheel studs while accommodating the wider track.

Interior: Retrim the cabin in bespoke Bridge of Weir leather with Alcantara headliner and carbon fiber trim by Sabelt. Install a full roll cage by Custom Cages (FIA-spec, bolt-in) with integrated harness bars for a six-point Schroth Profi II harness setup. Replace the stock steering wheel with a suede-wrapped Momo Prototipo (380mm) and add a digital dash by AIM MXS Strada.
